mapper.select: SELECT employee_id, COALESCE(SUM(service_count), 0) as total_service_count, COALESCE(SUM(service_amount), 0) as total_service_amount, COALESCE(SUM(commission), 0) as total_commission FROM performance_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND employee_id = #{employeeId} AND date >= #{startDate} AND date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY employee_id

SELECT store_id, COALESCE(SUM(service_count), 0) as total_service_count, COALESCE(SUM(service_amount), 0) as total_service_amount, COALESCE(SUM(commission), 0) as total_commission FROM performance_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND date >= #{startDate} AND date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY store_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(service_count), 0) as total_service_count, COALESCE(SUM(service_amount), 0) as total_service_amount, COALESCE(SUM(commission), 0) as total_commission FROM performance_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND date >= #{startDate} AND date <= #{endDate}
